About the Director

Crafting Visual Stories
That Move People

I'm Flavio Furtado, a Creative Art Director with over a decade of experience transforming ideas into immersive visual experiences. From award-winning games to impactful brand campaigns, my work bridges the gap between art and strategy.

Creative Disciplines

From pixel-perfect interfaces to immersive game worlds, every project is an opportunity to push creative boundaries. Based in Belem, Pará, I collaborate with clients worldwide.

Featured Projects

Deep Dives Into
Creative Process

2023

Space Waste

An arcade-style space shooter created for Vale, blending environmental education with addictive gameplay. Awarded Best Narrative at Game Jam Plus. Available on Nintendo Switch.

2022

Caminito

A vibrant visual identity celebrating Argentine culture through bold typography, handcrafted textures, and a palette drawn from Buenos Aires street art.

2021

Club 4

Complete art direction for an exclusive nightlife brand — from logo and identity to environmental design and digital presence. Dark, sophisticated aesthetic with neon accents.

2020

Flavio Games

The personal game development studio where experimental ideas become playable realities. A sandbox for innovation in art-driven game design.

"Best of Meio e Mensagem Regional Advertising — recognized for pushing creative boundaries in the Brazilian market with work that connects brands to culture and creates meaningful impact through visual storytelling."

Best Narrative
